items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the custom payload configuration (JSON structure) is not fully supported by the evidence provided. While there are some successful prior steps, they do not directly address the specific requirement of custom payload configuration. The previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1) was also blocked due to insufficient evidence regarding the required event types, indicating a broader issue with the available data.
